description: Public source of truth for the RAPP digital-organism kernel. Every released version is preserved here at a stable URL forever. New versions are added; old ones are never modified or removed.

signing._note: Signing fields are null until this variant adopts signed releases. When adopted, `method` is one of 'gpg', 'sigstore', 'minisign'; `key_id` identifies the public key; `verification_uri` documents how to verify (e.g. https://keys.openpgp.org/vks/v1/by-fingerprint/<KEYID> or a sigstore identity URI). Per-version attestations live under each `versions[].attestation`.

versions.notes: Canonical kernel after the digital-organism re-establishment. UTF-8 safe across all OS locales. Fixture 02 included.
